zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前价格运行于二十日均线下方，短线走势呈现高位震荡偏弱格局。二十四小时波动幅度有限，多空力量暂时保持均衡，若后续无法重新站稳均线，上行动能仍可能继续受到压制，市场以观望情绪为主。

从技术指标观察，SMA20约在61457附近，现价略低于均线，显示短期趋势偏弱。MACD仍保持正值，说明中期多头基础尚未完全破坏，但缺少Signal与RSI数据，确认力度不足，应结合成交量进一步判断。

短线可重点关注61245附近支撑区域，若失守则可能测试更低价位；上方首要阻力位关注61448至61460区域，若有效突破并站稳，则有机会重新挑战更高压力区，趋势有望逐步转强。

交易策略方面，建议等待价格突破阻力或确认支撑后再顺势介入，避免在窄幅震荡中频繁追涨杀跌。短线交易应严格设置止损，控制仓位，中线投资者可继续关注均线修复及动能变化，再决定加仓或减仓。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading around 61,366, holding almost unchanged over the past 24 hours with a modest 0.02% gain. Price remains slightly below the 20-day simple moving average at 61,457, suggesting short-term momentum has softened after recent advances. The narrow daily range between 61,245 and 61,448 also reflects a period of consolidation, where buyers and sellers appear balanced while waiting for a decisive catalyst to establish the next directional move.

The available technical indicators present a mixed but generally cautious picture. The positive MACD reading of 257.72 indicates that medium-term bullish momentum has not fully disappeared, although the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of whether momentum is strengthening or fading. Likewise, the unavailable RSI limits assessment of overbought or oversold conditions. Even so, trading just below the 20-day moving average implies the market has not yet regained convincing short-term bullish control.

Immediate support can be identified near the session low around 61,245, with stronger psychological support likely emerging near the 61,000 level if selling pressure increases. Initial resistance sits around the 20-day moving average at approximately 61,457, followed by the recent intraday high near 61,448, where sellers have already demonstrated willingness to defend prices. A sustained break above this zone could encourage renewed buying interest, while a failure to hold support may expose Bitcoin to a deeper corrective move.

For active traders, patience may offer the best risk-adjusted approach until price escapes the current consolidation range. Bullish positions become more attractive following a confirmed close above the moving average with expanding volume, while bearish opportunities would gain credibility if price falls decisively below support. Conservative investors may prefer gradual accumulation during controlled pullbacks rather than chasing short-term rallies, always employing disciplined stop-loss placement and prudent position sizing to manage cryptocurrency volatility effectively.
